title: Departmental minute on the COVID-19 autumn 2025 vaccination programme
body: "The advice on the COVID-19 vaccination programme for autumn 2025 was published on 13 November 2024 by the independent Joint Committee on Vaccination and Immunisation (JCVI).  On 16 July 2025, Ashley Dalton MP, Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State for Public Health and Prevention, made a written ministerial statement about the contingent liability for the programme. "
